themes.label: Home / Belonging
themes.description: Dreams of a safe home base and reciprocal belonging with family, a partner, friends, or community.
themes.classification_guidance: Use for sanctuary, rootedness, reciprocal love, family, friendship, or community. Do not use for material stability alone.

themes.label: Cultivation
themes.description: Dreams of growing or tending land, food, a creative practice, study, a business, or a way of life over time.
themes.classification_guidance: Use for making, growing, learning, practicing, building, or tending over time. Publicly sharing the result may also qualify for Transmission.

themes.label: Service
themes.description: Dreams of directly helping, healing, teaching, advocating for, or materially supporting people, communities, or animals.
themes.classification_guidance: Use for direct help, care, repair, teaching, advocacy, or material support. Do not infer it from a caring personality without a stated aspiration.

themes.label: Freedom
themes.description: Dreams of autonomy over movement, time, place, identity, or the terms of work and daily life.
themes.classification_guidance: Use for mobility, travel, release, independence, time autonomy, or living authentically. Financial stability alone is Self-Sufficiency, not Freedom.

themes.label: Stewardship
themes.description: Dreams of taking durable responsibility for land, resources, institutions, family wellbeing, or community continuity.
themes.classification_guidance: Use for sustained custodianship beyond the self: land, resources, institutions, family wellbeing, or community continuity. Direct aid may also qualify for Service.

themes.label: Self-Sufficiency
themes.description: Dreams of a dependable material base—income, health, home, land, or food—that reduces survival pressure and reliance on unstable systems.
themes.classification_guidance: Use for financial security, stable work, health, housing, land, food, or other dependable material foundations. Assign Home / Belonging too only when relationship or rootedness is present.

themes.label: Transmission
themes.description: Dreams of carrying knowledge, art, story, skill, culture, or legacy outward to others or forward to another generation.
themes.classification_guidance: Use for teaching, publishing, performing, sharing creative work, influencing, communicating, or carrying a legacy. Private making alone is Cultivation.

shared_boundaries: Assign every materially expressed theme; assignments are multi-label and have no primary theme.
Use only the dreams summary and verbatim text. Do not infer themes from placements, lessons, life events, notes, or isolated words.
Peace, rest, recovery, recognition, status, and literal sleep dreams remain unthemed unless the surrounding aspiration establishes one of the seven themes.
Use an empty theme_ids array when there is no current aspiration, the response is unclear, or none of the seven themes honestly applies.
